name: Masayoshi Nakashima
description: Patriarch of the Nakashima family, who often attend [Takeru](https://anilist.co/character/76818/Takeru-Nakashima)'s matches. The family has grown to be known as Wakutani South's famous "cheering squad family". He is terribly in love with his wife and is often shown to be lovey-dovey with her, even in front of their 5 kids.
